caption: The video appears to be a news segment discussing political developments, specifically focusing on potential alliances for the year 2024. The central figure in the video is a man speaking into an ANI microphone, likely addressing the media or giving an interview. He is wearing a checkered shawl and seems to be outdoors, possibly at a public event or gathering, as there are other people visible in the background. The text overlay in Hindi translates to "Will there be a game with JDU in 2024?" indicating that the discussion revolves around political strategies and alliances involving the Janata Dal United (JDU) party. The names of various political figures, such as Samrat Choudhuri, Vijay Sinha, Vijendra Yadav, and Shravan Kumar, are displayed on the screen, suggesting their relevance to the topic being discussed. The timestamp indicates that this segment aired at 10:06 PM.
